description_long: This is a modern high-top sneaker featuring a sleek black upper and a striking orange sole. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or similar material, with a smooth, matte finish and minimal visible stitching. The sole is thick and features a unique, lattice-like structure, likely designed for both style and enhanced cushioning. A prominent orange strap or decorative element is present on the tongue, adding a futuristic touch to the design. The shoe includes a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing, and the overall construction suggests durability and comfort for urban environments. The color contrast and geometric sole pattern make this shoe stand out as a fashionable and functional choice for city wear.
description: A high-top sneaker with a black upper and bold orange, lattice-structured sole, featuring a prominent orange strap on the tongue and a pull tab at the heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black upper, orange lattice sole, and the orange strap detail on the tongue.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central orange strap on the tongue and the rounded toe with orange trim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same black upper and orange lattice sole, with the pull tab visible at the heel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel pull tab and the wraparound orange lattice sole.
